No API design or tooling issues found. This is the first release of `@azure/arm-alertrulerecommendations` (1.0.0-beta.1) with API version `2023-08-01-preview`. Version is correctly aligned across `package.json`, the context file (`azsdk-js-arm-alertrulerecommendations/1.0.0-beta.1`), and `CHANGELOG.md`. No naming issues (`_N`, `AutoGenerated`, or `_` prefix), no type-safety concerns, and no breaking-change violations. The `AzureClouds` enum is present by design.
